Bridge.hide_action: mask finally slips, {prop} trembling as buried emotion breaks through the neon surface
Bridge.default_action: looks past the camera as long-held emotion surfaces, {prop} vibrating faintly with the vocal line

Outro.cry_action: lets the smile fall; {prop} dims as tears trace the neon edge into silence
Outro.default_action: slows to stillness, {prop} settling into the final graphite reflection

Chorus.smile_action: surges forward with {prop} raised, forced smile vivid against the neon light
Chorus.default_action: pushes forward through the brightest neon layer with {prop} leading the frame

Intro.music_cue_action: stands in controlled stillness, making a small hand gesture as {prop} begins to glow

shot_overrides.Intro: wide establishing anime frame with the protagonist small but clearly identifiable
shot_overrides.Bridge: intimate close-up profile shifting to a three-quarter emotional reveal
shot_overrides.Outro: slow pullback from the signature prop to the full silhouette

chorus_shot_fast: dynamic forward tracking shot, low angle, strong beat-synced foreground streaks
chorus_shot_default: forward tracking shot with widening background parallax and brighter rim light

Intro.any: slow push-in that reveals the song-specific prop and silhouette

Verse.fast: tight lateral tracking with small beat-synced body accents
Verse.medium: gentle lateral dolly following the lyric gesture
Verse.slow: lingering drift with minimal hand and eye movement

Pre-Chorus.fast: rising handheld drift with quick light pulses before the hook
Pre-Chorus.medium: subtle handheld drift that builds anticipation
Pre-Chorus.slow: gradual tilt and suspended pause before the emotional turn

Chorus.fast: beat-matched forward dolly with short acceleration bursts
Chorus.medium: steady forward dolly with visible rhythmic parallax
Chorus.slow: broad slow push through intensified neon atmosphere

Bridge.any: slow tilt from the signature prop to the face, then a motivated match cut

Outro.any: slow pullback and dissolve into graphite-gray silence
